# Ultrawhale Dogfeed Pipeline

## About
High-throughput Q&A data synthesis pipeline for training LLMs. Self-hosted, SOTA, open-source — generates up to 7.2K+ validated Q&A pairs per day on a single MacBook.

## Key links
- GitHub: https://github.com/peterlodri-sec/ultrawhale-dogfood-pipeline
- Dataset (HF): https://huggingface.co/datasets/PeetPedro/ultrawhale-dogfood
- Architecture: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- OpenAPI spec: docs/openapi.yaml
- Disaster recovery: docs/disaster-recovery.md
- Proposal site: https://proposal.vaked.dev

## Quick start
```bash
git clone https://github.com/peterlodri-sec/ultrawhale-dogfood-pipeline.git
cd ultrawhale-dogfood-pipeline
pip install .
ultrawhale generate --num 100 --category cs
```

## CLI
- `ultrawhale generate` — generate Q&A pairs
- `ultrawhale upload` — upload to HuggingFace
- `ultrawhale compress` — kompress-v8 compression
- `ultrawhale status` — health check

## Configuration
All via env vars: `LLM_HOST`, `LLM_MODEL`, `HF_TOKEN`, `LLAMA_SERVER_BIN`, `ULTRAWHALE_*`.

## API
- Local LLM server: `http://localhost:8080/v1/chat/completions` (OpenAI-compatible)
- HF dataset API: `https://huggingface.co/api/datasets/PeetPedro/ultrawhale-dogfood`

## Tests
```bash
pip install .[dev] && pytest
```

## License
MIT — see LICENSE.

## Related
- kompress-ultra: context compression for LLMs
- proposal.vaked.dev: full proposal site with OG/Twitter meta tags
